exemplar.title: How does Thi Bui use graphic elements in her memoir, âThe Best We Could Doâ, to illustrate the complexities of parent-child relationships in traumatised families?

detailedExemplarData.title: How does Thi Bui use graphic elements in her memoir, âThe Best We Could Doâ, to illustrate the complexities of parent-child relationships in traumatised families?

subject.title: English Lang & Lit (Old)
subject.description: IB English Language & Literature combines the study of language and literature, analyzing both literary and non-literary texts across various media and contexts. Students explore how language shapes meaning, identity, and culture through critical examination of diverse text types including advertisements, speeches, novels, and digital media. The course develops analytical skills, cultural understanding, and critical thinking about communication in different contexts and purposes.

files.fileName: Higher Level Essay_ Tamanna Kaveri Sen .pdf

strengths: Demonstrates thorough and persuasive interpretation of thematic implications across the memoirâs non-linear structure
Consistently integrates well-chosen textual and visual references (quotations, page numbers, figures) that effectively underpin arguments
Shows deep understanding of historical and psychological context, linking colour symbolism to intergenerational trauma
weaknesses: Occasional assertions could be more fully argued rather than stated
Minor inconsistencies in citation style (Works Cited formatting)
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The studentâs knowledge and interpretive approach move beyond good to excellent through sustained, persuasive reading of narrative and thematic elements. References are well selected and effectively explained, and insights into context and symbolism are consistently convincing. Minor lapses in full argumentative development and formatting keep this from the perfect descriptor, but overall performance merits the top band.

strengths: Offers consistently insightful analysis of graphic weight, colour symbolism and panel composition
Connects formal features (negative space, foreshadowing, sub-panel layering) directly to emotional and psychological subtext
Demonstrates perceptive evaluation of authorial choices that deepen reader understanding
weaknesses: A few paragraphs revert to descriptive summary rather than analysis
Could deepen some compositional discussion (e.g., Gestalt principles)
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The essay provides sophisticated, convincing analysis of visual and textual features, linking formal choices to thematic meaning. While occasional descriptive lapses occur, the majority of the evaluation is both insightful and nuanced, fulfilling the criteria for band 5 analysis.

strengths: Clear, logical progression of ideas from father to mother focus to synthesis
Generally smooth transitions and strong conclusion that returns to the thesis
Effective embedding of figures adjacent to commentary
weaknesses: Minor redundancies and an incomplete sentence interrupt cohesion
Topic sentences could more precisely foreground the graphic feature under analysis
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Structure and development are well controlled, with a coherent line of inquiry and effective integration of evidence. Occasional lapses in cohesion and precision prevent a fully seamless, band 5 organization, placing this criterion solidly in band 4.

strengths: Language is clear, varied and generally precise, employing appropriate academic vocabulary
Register and style remain consistently appropriate to an HL literary analysis
Sentence structures are controlled and technical terms used accurately
weaknesses: Minor grammatical slips (comma omissions, diacritic inconsistencies)
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The essayâs language demonstrates good accuracy and clarity with a formal, scholarly register. Minor errors do not impede communication but prevent the near-faultless precision of band 5, fitting the descriptors for band 4 language.

strandSelections.reasoning: Figures are embedded adjacent to commentary, and in-text references (e.g., "Fig. 3") guide the reader. Quotations and visual details are woven into sentences rather than merely appended, though the prose occasionally shifts to a descriptive catalogue. The overall integration of evidence within analytic paragraphs is mostly fluent, aligning with "mostly well integrated" in band 4.

The student demonstrates a solid grasp of the memoirâs narrative arc, historical context (Vietnamese war, refugee experience) and key thematic concerns (parent-child distance, intergenerational trauma). Discussion of both parentsâ childhoods and their effect on later behaviour shows the student can connect events across the non-linear structure. Interpretive commentsâsuch as the loss of innocence symbolised by persistent grey tonesâare sustained and usually convincing, though occasionally asserted rather than fully argued, so the work sits comfortably in the âgoodâ rather than âexcellentâ range.

The introduction states the research question, paragraphs follow a logical sequence (father focus, then mother focus, then synthesis), and topic sentences keep the line of inquiry visible. Transitions are generally smooth and the conclusion returns to the thesis. Minor redundancy (re-explaining colour scheme) and a few abrupt paragraph endings show room for tighter cohesion, but overall structure is well controlled and appropriately developed.

Page numbers, figure labels and short textual quotations are supplied consistently, and images are embedded to illustrate points about colour palette, angle and panel layout. These references clearly underpin the studentâs claims and are usually explained, although commentary sometimes drifts into description before returning to analysis. The relevance and frequency of support meet the descriptor for effective use, but selection is not yet sophisticated enough for the top band.

The student sustains a formal, analytical register appropriate to an HL essay. First-person references to the author ("Bui shows") are conventional for literary analysis, and tone remains objective and scholarly. While effective, stylistic choices are not especially distinctive or sophisticated to merit band 5, but they are consistently appropriate, comfortably satisfying band 4.

Language is clear, varied and generally precise, with academic vocabulary such as "juxtaposition," "interplay," and "reverberations." Occasional minor slips (e.g., "BÃ´"/"Bá»" inconsistency, missing commas) do not impede communication. Sentence structures are controlled, and technical terms are used accurately, meeting the criteria for good accuracy rather than the near-faultless precision of band 5.

The essay moves beyond description by examining graphic weight, negative space, foreshadowing and colour symbolism and linking these choices to psychological states and relationship arcs. Many insightsâe.g., the undivided panel foreshadowing the fatherâs inability to escape paternal scarsâare perceptive. Yet a few passages lapse into retelling or broad thematic statements without interrogating how visual techniques create meaning, preventing the analysis from being "consistently insightful and convincing" required for band 5.

annotations.comment: The subtitle presents a clear, focused framing of the investigation into parentâchild dynamics and trauma, effectively situating the reader in the essayâs line of inquiry.
The research question is wellâformulated but could be tightened by specifying which graphic elements (e.g., colour palettes, panel transitions) will be the focal points of analysis.
The opening quote effectively anchors the discussion in Buiâs own words, demonstrating sound use of textual support.
This paragraph leans heavily on summary; consider pruning narrative description and embedding analysis of the memoirâs visual form earlier to strengthen evaluative depth.
Referencing specific page numbers and juxtaposed panels (85 & 90) is effective, but you could explain why these pages are particularly representative of broader narrative themes.
The analysis of Buiâs use of sepia versus black in Fig. 1 insightfully ties colour choice to emotional states, demonstrating consistent interpretive skill.
When describing the undivided panel, consider unpacking how the bleed-over between the two images shapes the readerâs emotional response at a formal, compositional level.
The description of Fig. 3 breaks off mid-sentence; be sure to complete this thought to maintain cohesion and clarity.
Embedding the caption for Fig. 3 adjacent to the analysis shows good integration of visual evidence within the argument.
The discussion of MÃ¡âs panels integrates multiple graphic elements effectively, illustrating how colour and angle convey intergenerational trauma.
When referring to <math display="inline">Ma</math>, ensure you enclose the term in proper LaTeX delimiters (e.g., $$Ma$$) for clarity in the final typeset.
The phrase âemphasises on howâ is nonstandard; revise to âemphasises howâ to maintain idiomatic academic style.
Your final paragraph neatly reiterates the essayâs themes, but it remains abstract; tie conclusions back to at least one concrete panel analysis to reinforce the argument.
The Works Cited entry includes basic details but should follow a consistent style guide (e.g., MLA) with italics for the title and place of publication.
The introduction articulates the memoirâs context and thematic concerns clearly, demonstrating strong subject knowledge and contextual framing.
Consider tightening the topic sentences so each paragraph foregrounds which graphic feature will be analysed, improving organizational clarity.
The analysis of negative space around Bá»âs figure is perceptive but could be deepened by discussing how spatial composition affects pacing.
Your description of colour symbolism consistently connects to emotional subtext, reflecting sustained interpretation rather than surface commentary.
In the discussion of panel layouts, you might reference Gestalt principles (closure, continuity) to deepen your evaluation of how viewers read these images.
The essay makes effective use of descriptive labels (e.g., âturbulent watersâ), but occasional lapses into descriptive catalogue weaken critical engagement.
The analysis of MÃ¡âs sub-panel layering communicates her emotional distance well and illustrates clear understanding of compositional effects.
The conclusion nicely circles back to the research question, reaffirming the essayâs cohesive development of the central argument.
